title: Max Fashion is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Max Fashion is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Fashion! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Fashion:
Max Fashion is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion!
